items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve all of New Mexico, Southern Colorado, and West Texas. Our main office is in Albuquerque, with crews based in Santa Fe and Las Cruces.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes. MaxBuild holds New Mexico General Contractor license NM-12345-GC and carries full liability and workers compensation insurance on every job.

items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Every estimate is free. We come out, look at the job, and give you a written quote. No pressure, no hidden fees.

items.question: How long does a typical roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential roofs take two to four days depending on size and weather. We will give you a timeline at the estimate and stick to it.

items.question: Can you handle both residential and commercial work?
items.answer: Absolutely. We work on single-family homes, multi-unit buildings, offices, and retail spaces. Same quality standards across the board.

items.question: What kind of warranty do you offer?
items.answer: Every project comes with a written warranty. Roofing carries a 10-year workmanship warranty. Plumbing, electrical, and HVAC come with a 5-year warranty on labor.

items.question: Do you pull permits?
items.answer: Yes. We handle all permits and inspections as part of the job. You should never have to set foot in a city office.

items.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, check, credit cards, and offer financing on projects over $5,000. Ask about our 12-month same-as-cash option.
